subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory! The servant who was present came with thy letter and placed it before the Wronged One. We found therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و عرضه لدی المظلوم وجدنا منه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort
